data.text: PROFILE OF Oluwaseyi Obabunmi ADETOLA, Esq.
Oluwaseyi Obabunmi Adetola is a seasoned professional and currently serves as the Divisional Head, Legal & Regulatory Compliance of First Registrars & Investor Services Limited.

He boasts extensive experience in Investment Banking, Management, Accounting, Legal Matters, Capital Market Operations, Facility Management, Leadership, Human Capital Management, and Property Management.
Academic and Professional Qualifications:
- Higher National Diploma (HND) in Accountancy, Akwa Ibom State Polytechnic, Akwa-Ibom State
- Post-Graduate Diploma in Financial Management (PGD), Ladoke Akintola University of Technology
- Bachelor of Laws (LL.B), Olabisi Onabanjo University, Ago-Iwoye, Ogun State
- Barrister at Law (BL), Nigerian Law School/Council of Legal Education/Body of Benchers
- Fellow of the Institute of Capital Market Registrars (FICMR)
- Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Mediators and Conciliators (FICMC)
- Fellow of the Institute of Credit Collection Management (FICCM)
- Fellow of the Nigerian Institute of Training and Development (FITD)
- Fellow of Chartered Institute of Education and Training (FCIET), USA
- An Accredited Trainer of Centre for Management (ATCMD)
- Member of the Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria
- Associate of the Institute of Chartered Secretaries and Administrators (AICSAN)
- Associate of the Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers (ACS)
- Associate of the Chartered Institute for Securities and Investment - CISI (ACSI), UK
Working/Professional Experience:
Oluwaseyi began his banking career in March 1985 at Union Bank of Nigeria Limited, working in the Registrars Department (1985-1994).

He later moved to the Human Resources Department, contributing to training initiatives. He played a key role in establishing the Consultancy Department of Union Bank, training staff in share registration.
He worked with the Accenture Management Consultant Team during the Union Bank - Staff Reengineering Process.

He also extensively participated as Trainer together with the Management/Flexcube Training Team from Indian to train the Union Bank Plc - general Staff after the re-engineering process for the implementation and conversion of the Bank's operation to the FLEXCUBE Banking Software Package.

He worked with Union Bank for about 23 years before joining First Registrars Nigeria Limited in January 2009 as Head, Management Services Division and has over the years been saddle with the responsibilities cutting across the Admin and General Services, Mailing functions, Facility Management, Human Capital Management, Planning, Know your Customer (KYC), and Training/Performance Management activities...
He currently oversees Legal, Regulatory, and Compliance matters of the First Registrars & Investor Services Ltd and he reports directly to the Managing Director/CEO.
Positions and Achievements:
- Vice Chairman, Legal Committee Team, Institute of Capital Market Registrars
- Management Member, Education and Training Committee, Institute of Capital Market Registrars
- Award Winner, First Bank's Subsidiary Best Staff of the year under Chief-Executive Annual Merit Award (CAMA) 2011/2012
- Participant in various leadership, management, and governance training programs
Personal Life:

Oluwaseyi was born on 7th June, 1965 into a Christian family. He is committed to a devoted Christian life, known for integrity and sterling qualities. He is married to Modupe Senayan Bolanle, and they are blessed with three godly Children and Grandchildren...
